titleEn: Roman Reign of Constantine the Great
descriptionEn: Constantine legalized Christianity across Rome during his reign as emperor.
articleEn: Flavius Valerius Aurelius Constantinus Augustus, known as Constantine the Great, Constantine I and Saint Constantine, served as Emperor of Rome from 306 until 337 A.D. He is credited with bringing religious toleration to the Empire in 313.

images.caption: Arch of Constantine and Colosseum, Roma, Italy
